owner_operator_stated: Dr. David A. Ingram, DDS (per site); NOT Sangita W. Trehan — Trehan now operates separately as Trehan Dental at 435 N Hough St, Barrington (847-381-1707)
notes: Record's address (202 S Cook St, Barrington) is now occupied by Dr. David A. Ingram, DDS (site: barringtonfamilydentist.com), not Sangita W. Trehan DDS Ltd. Ingram's listed phone (847-381-2000) does not match the record phone (847-381-5466). Trehan's real current practice (trehandental.com) is at a different address, 435 N Hough St, Barrington, IL, phone (847) 381-1707 — also not matching the record phone. The record phone (847) 381-5466 could not be located on any current website (search for the exact number returned no Barrington dentist match). Successor/ownership conflict established via the address match only.

Site brand name 'Barrington Grove Dental' differs from the NPI legal entity name 'Excellence Dental of Barrington, PLLC' but address (1531 S Grove Ave Suite 103) and phone (847-382-0818) match the record exactly — treated as a DBA of the same practice, not a conflict. /careers returned 404, no hiring/openings content found. Record provider_count is 3 but only 2 dentists (Passehl, Sekulich) are named on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Imagen Dental Partners LLC (multi-location dental support organization)
notes: Address (106 S Wynstone Park Dr Ste 102) and phone (847-438-7338) match the record exactly, confirming continuity of the same physical practice. The practice is branded 'Lakeside Dental' and is part of Imagen Dental Partners LLC, a multi-location DSO — this is DSO ownership, not a successor conflict (per Rule 4). Team page lists only Dr. Patrycja Radon, DMD; Dr. Janet Century (the named record owner) is not on the current team roster (only an old Facebook page link referencing 'JanetCenturyDDS' was found). A location-filtered careers portal exists and the site footer invites viewing 'current openings,' but the fetch could not surface specific job titles for this location (likely JS-rendered listing), so no openings were logged.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Lina Garcia, DDS, DMD (founder/practice owner)
notes: Address (33 W Higgins Rd Suite 600) and phone (847-426-9000) match the record exactly. Named record entity 'Lina Garcia DDS' confirmed as practice owner/founder. Second provider Dr. Joseph Grasso, DO practices osteopathy alongside her, matching record provider_count=2. No careers/hiring page found on homepage or contact page.

owner_operator_stated: Pennino Family Dentistry (30+ year family practice); NOT Hart Dental — Hart Dental operates separately at 728 W Northwest Hwy, Barrington (847-865-4278)
notes: Vendor hint (hartdentalbarrington.com) led to Hart Dental's actual current site, but that site lists a DIFFERENT address (728 W Northwest Hwy) and phone ((847) 865-4278) than the record (203 W NW Hwy / (847) 381-6222) — Hart Dental has relocated. Both the record's address and phone are independently confirmed (web search for the exact quoted phone number, plus penninofamilydentistry.com) to belong to Pennino Family Dentistry, a separate 30+ year family practice with doctors Mansour, Bonk, Wong, and Williams. Classic successor/relocation scenario — two distinct practices, not the same entity.

owner_operator_stated: Eva M. Lyon, D.D.S., P.C. (dba Deerfield Dental Care)
notes: Address (420 Lake Cook Rd Suite 110) and phone (847-444-1111) match the record exactly. Web search confirms the legal entity is 'Eva M. Lyon, D.D.S., P.C.' operating under the name 'Deerfield Dental Care' — consistent with record. /about and /meet-dr-lyon subpages 404'd; no careers/hiring page found.
